verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_3: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
verse.verse_4: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,
verse.verse_5: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
verse.verse_6: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
verse.verse_7: He will be in a pleasant life.
verse.verse_8: But as for one whose scales are light,
verse.verse_9: His refuge will be an abyss.
verse.verse_10: And what can make you know what that is?
verse.verse_11: It is a Fire, intensely hot.
